name: News Invest
summary: News Invest provides integrated marketing communication services to institutional, commercial, and financial customers in France. The company offers interactive media strategy, digital identity, online communication and mobile, interactive advertising, and SEO services. It also provides council strategy and corporate communication; consulting and strategy in environmental communication and sustainable development; financial communications consultancy; press relation; edition; corporate and financial advertising; and events corporate and financial services. The company is based in Paris, France.
